content:
I've listened to syntax for years now and I wish them well, but these days they're all AI all the time and I'm over it. Do y'all have recommendations for podcasts that cover the sort of stuff they used to? New projects, big updates to existing ones, well-researched and in-depth explanations of tricky topics, that sort of thing? Shop talk show is good and they haven't swerved into vibe-coding land, but they're more of a "two dudes hanging out trading opinions" show than a "keep up with what's happening" show. Any other good ones out there?

  submitted by   /u/Traches
[link]   [comments]
